meta.title: Serahr — Custom Software Development
meta.description: Prototyping for software solutions. We develop custom software solutions — from the first idea to the finished, production-ready tool.

hero.headline: Custom Software Development
hero.subheadline: You have the idea — we deliver the tool. Personal support, short lines, and a clear plan from day one.

remind.name: SerahrRemind
remind.description: Automatic reminders via email, SMS, and phone calls (TTS). Automated sequences and calendar integration for practices and service providers.

chat.name: SerahrChat
chat.description: AI-powered answers, multilingual (DE/EN), quick integration on any website. Full data control as a managed service.

count.name: Your Next Product?
count.description: Have an idea for a software tool? We'll build it — as a prototype, MVP, or finished product. Get in touch.

process.title: From Idea to Finished Product
process.subtitle: Four steps to your custom solution — transparent, predictable, and with personal support.
process.step1_text: We get to know your business, clarify your requirements, and define goals together. You receive an initial assessment of feasibility and effort.
process.step2_text: Based on our conversation, we create a detailed plan: feature scope, technical architecture, timeline, and transparent cost overview.
process.step3_text: You quickly receive a working prototype. In short feedback cycles, we refine the product until it matches your expectations exactly.
process.step4_text: We accompany the launch, train you on the tool, and remain your personal contact for support and further development.
process.cta_note: No obligation, free of charge. Response within 24 hours.

contact.meta_description: Have questions or want to discuss a project? Write to us — we'll get back to you promptly.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions or want to discuss a project? Write to us — we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.topic_question: Question about an existing Serahr tool
contact.subject: Subject
contact.consent: I agree that my data will be stored to process my inquiry.
contact.consent_link: More info in the Privacy Policy
contact.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

remind_page.meta_description: Reduce no-shows with automatic reminders via SMS, email, and phone calls. For practices, salons, and service providers.
remind_page.headline: Appointment Reminders Made Easy
remind_page.subheadline: Fewer no-shows, better client communication — with automatic reminders via email, SMS, and phone calls.

reminders.title: Automatic Reminders
reminders.text: Email reminders are sent automatically. SMS and text-to-speech calls available as additional channels.

appointments.title: Appointment Management
appointments.text: Clear overview of all appointments with status tracking, filters, and calendar view.

clients.title: Client Management
clients.text: Central client database with contact details, preferences, and appointment history.

multitenancy.title: Multi-Tenant
multitenancy.text: Perfect for business groups and franchises. Each location has its own data and settings.

privacy.title: GDPR Compliant
privacy.text: Encrypted transmission, German server location, and audit log for traceability.

sequences.title: Flexible Sequences
sequences.text: 24h before, 1h before — you decide the timing, channel, and order.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Preliminary pricing — subject to change before official launch.
pricing.vat_note: All prices are net prices excluding applicable VAT.
pricing.demo_note: The demo shows all features and configuration options. SMS and phone calls are not active in the demo — only email reminders are sent.

audience.title: Perfect For
audience.items: Medical practices, Dental offices, Physiotherapy, Hair salons, Beauty studios, Consulting firms

demo.title: Try It Free
demo.text: Test SerahrRemind with the public demo. Use test data only — all data is reset every hour.
demo.note: No registration needed. Demo credentials on the login page.

chat_page.meta_description: An AI-powered chatbot that automatically answers customer questions. Multilingual, quick integration, full data control.
chat_page.headline: AI Chatbot for Your Website
chat_page.subheadline: Answer customer questions automatically — around the clock, multilingual, and integrated in just a few minutes.

ai.title: AI-Powered Answers
ai.text: Understands natural language and learns from your FAQ documents.

setup.title: Quick Integration
setup.text: One small script tag is all it takes — works on any website.

widget.title: Multilingual (DE/EN)
widget.text: Answers questions in German and English, automatically detected.

managed.title: Full Data Control
managed.text: Managed service with hosting in Germany. You control what the bot knows.

audience.title: Perfect For
audience.items: Small businesses, Service providers, Online shops, Practices, Associations

cta_bottom.title: Ready for better customer service?
cta_bottom.text: Integrate SerahrChat on your website in just a few minutes. We handle setup and operations.
cta_bottom.note: Managed service — you focus on your business, we take care of the chatbot.

count_page.meta_description: Track visitor flows in real time. Multi-entrance, smartphone-ready, export and analytics.
count_page.headline: Real-Time Visitor Counting
count_page.subheadline: Always know how many visitors are on site — for better planning and more safety.

realtime.title: Real-Time Counting
realtime.text: Live counting with instant display on any device.

simple.title: Multi-Entrance
simple.text: Count multiple entrances simultaneously — all in sync.

history.title: Export & Analytics
history.text: Analyze visitor trends and export your data.

share.title: Smartphone-Ready
share.text: Count by tap on your phone. Public display URL for visitors or authorities.

audience.title: Perfect For
audience.items: Events, Trade shows, Museums, Public facilities, Festivals, Markets
